text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Phase 1: Backend changes (models, schemas, services, routers)","description":"Modify all backend files for the ad-based BM transition:

1-1. `backend/app/models/subscription.py`: Remove BASIC/PREMIUM from SubscriptionTier, keep FREE/PRO only
1-2. `backend/app/models/usage.py`: Add bonus_count and reward_ads_watched columns to UsageRecord
1-3. `backend/app/services/quota_service.py`: Full rewrite - DAILY_LIMIT=200, BONUS_PER_AD=10, MAX_REWARD_ADS_PER_DAY=5, new decrement logic (base→bonus), grant_reward_bonus(), updated get_quota_info()
1-4. `backend/app/schemas/subscription.py`: Update QuotaResponse (remove tier, add bonus fields), add RewardClaimResponse
1-5. `backend/app/routers/quota.py`: Add POST /api/quota/reward endpoint
1-6. `backend/app/routers/llm.py`: Change 429 error message to "Watch a reward ad for extra requests."
1-7. `backend/app/services/receipt_validator.py`: Simplify PRODUCT_TIER_MAP to single pro.monthly entry
1-8. `backend/app/schemas/auth.py`: Add is_pro field to AuthUserInfo
1-9. `backend/app/routers/auth.py`: Compute is_pro in _build_user_info()","assignedBy":"backend-dev","timestamp":"2026-02-23T10:56:22.577Z"}
